response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical expertise in developer tooling and build systems, with direct experience at Google and Meta contributing to developer tooling and AI-agent infrastructure. However, his experience lacks explicit leadership in a dedicated engineering productivity role, and his people management track record is not clearly documented in a mid-to-senior management capacity. His background in mobile development is limited, and the role requires deeper alignment with mobile platform ecosystems.
strengths: Extensive experience in developer tooling and AI-agent infrastructure at Google and Meta
Proven technical leadership in building scalable systems and contributing to open-source projects
Strong background in testing and automation (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
concerns: Limited explicit experience in mobile platform ecosystems or developer tools for mobile platforms
Lacks clear documentation of leading organizational change or mid-to-senior management in a people-leadership role
No direct experience in build systems or testing infrastructure for large-scale mobile platforms

key_factors.factor: developer tooling and build systems experience
